notes: Postgres SendBatch amortizes independent upserts under bounded pool acquire/query budgets
Postgres COPY lane for append/import workloads; not a semantic upsert path
Redis SetGetMany pipeline lane for hot multi-key cache paths
Redis Streams XAddMany lane for durable projector/event relay append pressure
Redis Stream group drain+ack lane; setup is XADD pressure, measured path is read+ack lag
